status.knowledge_template_fidelity: 知识库/模板接入未强证据化

prior_conclusion_trial.risk: 只能证明必需文件和缓存文件检查通过，不能证明 AST、动态验证、report mapping、dashboard 真实闭环
prior_conclusion_trial.corrected: 部分证实。包卫生检查通过，但不等于工程能力 ready。
prior_conclusion_trial.needed: 增加 workflow 调用链、runtime backend、真实 replay、report generator、dashboard 读取真实产物的测试证据

prior_conclusion_trial.original_conclusion: verify_extreme_review_assets.py: ok，极限评审资产完整
prior_conclusion_trial.risk: 校验资产存在，不校验每项能力真实可执行
prior_conclusion_trial.corrected: 资产存在证实；能力 ready 未证实。
prior_conclusion_trial.needed: 增加每项 JS 收集/审计/漏洞链的执行级测试

prior_conclusion_trial.original_conclusion: verify_second_pass_assets.py: ok，二次反审资产完整
prior_conclusion_trial.risk: 只证明二次反审数据文件存在，不证明 detector、browser、HAR、Burp 真实可用
prior_conclusion_trial.corrected: 二次反审承载能力部分证实；真实漏洞发现能力仍 missing/partial。
prior_conclusion_trial.needed: 增加 detector harness、dynamic replay、schema validation、report mapping 测试

prior_conclusion_trial.original_conclusion: 修正后总分 32/100 足够严格
prior_conclusion_trial.risk: 32 分仍可能没有按失败惩罚规则细分 evidence/report/dashboard/replay 扣分
prior_conclusion_trial.corrected: 需要按失败惩罚规则再次下调并写明扣分证据。
prior_conclusion_trial.needed: 增加 final_court_score_penalty_rules.json 和命令输出

prior_conclusion_trial.original_conclusion: 知识库和漏洞模板未删除，原有 Skills 能力未削弱
prior_conclusion_trial.claimed_basis: 压缩包中仍有 knowledge/templates 目录
prior_conclusion_trial.risk: 存在不等于被索引、被路由、被报告模板调用；未削弱也需要 hash/文件列表对比证明
prior_conclusion_trial.corrected: 文件存在部分证实；调用链和能力未削弱未证实。
prior_conclusion_trial.needed: 新增 knowledge/template index checker、hash baseline、before/after 对比

prior_conclusion_trial.risk: 路由测试不是端到端执行，不证明脚本、schema、报告真实闭环
prior_conclusion_trial.corrected: 路由规则部分证实；执行链路未证实。
prior_conclusion_trial.needed: 新增 e2e workflow runner，校验 route → script → manifest → quality gate → report → dashboard

prior_conclusion_trial.risk: 包卫生结论可信，但不代表能力质量
prior_conclusion_trial.corrected: 证实为包卫生项，不应计入 JS 审计能力分。
prior_conclusion_trial.needed: 保留为卫生 gate，不扩大解释

prior_conclusion_trial.original_conclusion: 没有把 AST/runtime/detector 伪装成 ready
prior_conclusion_trial.claimed_basis: 二次反审结果中 parser_backend_evidence/runtime_bridge_evidence/detector_evidence 为空
prior_conclusion_trial.risk: 该结论本身可信，但还需要在所有文档和 README 中避免 ready 表述残留
prior_conclusion_trial.corrected: 部分证实；仍需全包 grep 文档一致性。
prior_conclusion_trial.needed: 新增 final evidence court grep 一致性检查和伪 ready 表

js_collection_incidents.why_current_misses: 缺少登录态浏览器采集器和 trace/HAR 资产账本
js_collection_incidents.possible_severe_vulnerability: 账号接管入口、hidden API、token refresh abuse
js_collection_incidents.acceptance: role-login replay 输出 HAR、trace、chunk hash、manifest

js_collection_incidents.missed_asset: 管理员角色才加载的 chunk
js_collection_incidents.why_current_misses: 缺少 admin/user role diff replay
js_collection_incidents.possible_severe_vulnerability: admin endpoint 越权、退款/封禁接口滥用
js_collection_incidents.acceptance: admin 与普通用户 chunk diff 产生 endpoint 差异证据

js_collection_incidents.why_current_misses: 缺少 tenant A/B runtime diff
js_collection_incidents.possible_severe_vulnerability: tenant-only API、BOLA、跨租户数据读取
js_collection_incidents.acceptance: 至少两个租户 replay 输出 chunk/API 差异

js_collection_incidents.why_current_misses: 缺少 feature flag forced route discovery
js_collection_incidents.possible_severe_vulnerability: 灰度 admin/internal endpoint、隐藏业务流
js_collection_incidents.acceptance: feature flag 组合触发 chunk 并记录来源

js_collection_incidents.why_current_misses: 缺少旧构建 sourcemap 枚举和 freshness gate
js_collection_incidents.possible_severe_vulnerability: 源码、secret、hidden API 泄露
js_collection_incidents.acceptance: 发现旧 map 并还原 sourcesContent/path

js_collection_incidents.why_current_misses: 缺少 CDN stale asset resurrection 检查
js_collection_incidents.possible_severe_vulnerability: 旧漏洞代码、已下线 endpoint、secret 残留
js_collection_incidents.acceptance: 同 asset 多版本 hash 差异和历史 URL 证据

js_collection_incidents.why_current_misses: 缺少 SW/Cache Storage runtime dump
js_collection_incidents.possible_severe_vulnerability: 持久 XSS、旧 API、cache poisoning
js_collection_incidents.acceptance: 导出 Cache Storage 资产账本

js_collection_incidents.why_current_misses: 缺少 _next/build-manifest 与 app-build-manifest 解析
js_collection_incidents.possible_severe_vulnerability: 未发现页面 chunk、server action/RSC 边界线索
js_collection_incidents.acceptance: 解析 pages/app route 到 chunk 映射

js_collection_incidents.why_current_misses: 缺少 manifest.json/modulepreload 解析
js_collection_incidents.possible_severe_vulnerability: 动态 import endpoint、env 泄露
js_collection_incidents.acceptance: 解析 entry/imports/dynamicImports/css/assets

js_collection_incidents.why_current_misses: 缺少 webpack runtime module id/chunk graph 解析
js_collection_incidents.possible_severe_vulnerability: 隐藏模块、异步路由、admin route
js_collection_incidents.acceptance: 还原 chunk id → URL → module 关系

js_collection_incidents.why_current_misses: 缺少 persisted query hash discovery
js_collection_incidents.possible_severe_vulnerability: hidden mutation、IDOR、tenant bypass
js_collection_incidents.acceptance: 提取 hash/query/mutation/variables 证据

js_collection_incidents.why_current_misses: 缺少 WS message capture/schema inference
js_collection_incidents.possible_severe_vulnerability: 跨用户消息读取、租户越权
js_collection_incidents.acceptance: 捕获消息 schema、auth header、tenant id

js_collection_incidents.why_current_misses: 缺少 Electron ASAR/preload/ipc 枚举
js_collection_incidents.possible_severe_vulnerability: preload bridge RCE、任意文件读写
js_collection_incidents.acceptance: 提取 preload、contextBridge、ipcRenderer 调用

js_collection_incidents.why_current_misses: 缺少 extension manifest/content/background 采集
js_collection_incidents.possible_severe_vulnerability: 权限提升、token leak、externally_connectable abuse
js_collection_incidents.acceptance: 解析 manifest/content scripts/host_permissions

js_collection_incidents.why_current_misses: 缺少 WebView bridge 名称和 native bridge 调用收集
js_collection_incidents.possible_severe_vulnerability: 移动端账号接管、任意调用 native 方法
js_collection_incidents.acceptance: 发现 window.* bridge、JSInterface、schema

js_collection_incidents.why_current_misses: 缺少 wasm/js glue 和 imports/exports 解析
js_collection_incidents.possible_severe_vulnerability: unsafe parser、边界逻辑缺陷、文件处理漏洞线索
js_collection_incidents.acceptance: 输出 wasm import/export、glue sink、调用点

js_collection_incidents.why_current_misses: 缺少 iframe src 与 postMessage runtime 采集
js_collection_incidents.possible_severe_vulnerability: token leak、origin bypass、account takeover
js_collection_incidents.acceptance: 记录 origin/source/data schema/sink

js_collection_incidents.missed_asset: 支付/退款/优惠券业务 JS
js_collection_incidents.why_current_misses: 缺少业务域 chunk 标记和敏感流量 replay
js_collection_incidents.possible_severe_vulnerability: 前端价格控制、退款滥用、优惠券逻辑绕过
js_collection_incidents.acceptance: 敏感业务入口触发 chunk 和 API diff

js_collection_incidents.why_current_misses: 缺少 preview/editor/markdown renderer 资产聚类
js_collection_incidents.possible_severe_vulnerability: stored DOM XSS、mXSS、SVG/PDF preview XSS
js_collection_incidents.acceptance: 提取 renderer、sanitizer、preview sink

js_collection_incidents.why_current_misses: 缺少浏览器 storage dump 与差异分析
js_collection_incidents.possible_severe_vulnerability: JWT/PII/tenant cache 泄露、跨标签 token leak
js_collection_incidents.acceptance: 导出 local/session/IndexedDB/CacheStorage 证据

pseudo_capabilities.real_implementation: 未发现 origin/source/data schema/sink 判定

提取 /graphql URL 不等于 GraphQL 安全审计

pseudo_capabilities.real_implementation: 未发现 Playwright/Burp/HAR bridge 和截图/请求响应证据

p0_nonnegotiable.problem: 真实 JS AST backend 缺失
p0_nonnegotiable.consequence: 复杂 wrapper、route、sink/source 全部可能漏报
p0_nonnegotiable.acceptance: 运行 availability check 和 AST fixture 后输出 AST node/sink/source 证据

p0_nonnegotiable.consequence: 源码、secret、hidden API、monorepo path 泄露漏报
静态候选被误报为 verified，证据链不可复核
p0_nonnegotiable.acceptance: 生成 HAR、截图、request/response、trace 证据字段

p0_nonnegotiable.consequence: admin chunk、tenant chunk、BOLA/IDOR 大量漏报
p0_nonnegotiable.acceptance: 至少输出 user/admin/tenantA/tenantB endpoint/chunk diff

p0_nonnegotiable.problem: 严重 JS 漏洞 detector harness 缺失
p0_nonnegotiable.evidence: 未发现 detectors/ 或 detector registry
p0_nonnegotiable.consequence: 30 类严重漏洞只能候选化，无法稳定发现
p0_nonnegotiable.acceptance: 每个 detector 输出 evidence id、confidence、blocked/review/verified 状态

p0_nonnegotiable.problem: schema 强校验未统一接入
p0_nonnegotiable.evidence: schemas 存在但缺统一 validator
p0_nonnegotiable.consequence: manifest/report 字段漂移，证据不可强校验
p0_nonnegotiable.acceptance: 无效 manifest 必须失败并列出字段路径

p0_nonnegotiable.consequence: 漏洞无法从证据闭环进入报告，报告污染风险高
p0_nonnegotiable.acceptance: candidate/review/verified 状态在报告中分区输出

p0_nonnegotiable.evidence: 未发现 dashboard_generator.py 或 dashboard/
p0_nonnegotiable.consequence: 展示层伪闭环，无法追踪 route→evidence→quality
p0_nonnegotiable.acceptance: dashboard 从 last-final-evidence-court.json 生成页面

p0_nonnegotiable.evidence: fixtures 多为 README 或单个 JSON 占位
p0_nonnegotiable.acceptance: 每类严重漏洞至少四类样本各 1 个

p0_nonnegotiable.problem: 知识库/模板保真度未强证据化
p0_nonnegotiable.consequence: 可能误删、误路由或模板孤岛
p0_nonnegotiable.acceptance: before/after hash 和索引引用一致

p0_nonnegotiable.problem: 真实 OSS replay 缺失
p0_nonnegotiable.consequence: 复杂框架覆盖率不可证实
p0_nonnegotiable.acceptance: 至少 10 个授权/本地 OSS replay 合同通过

p0_nonnegotiable.problem: 伪 ready 文档一致性 gate 缺失
p0_nonnegotiable.consequence: README/SKILL.md 可能把 doc-only 写成 ready
p0_nonnegotiable.acceptance: 任何无 backend 证据的 ready 表述导致 CI 失败

final_findings.current_standard: 未达到世界顶级 JS 安全渗透测试 Skills 标准
most_likely_missed_severe_vulns: Source Map 泄露源码 → hidden API
Source Map 泄露源码 → secret
JS hidden admin endpoint → 越权
GraphQL persisted query hash 枚举
hallucination_hotspots: quality gate 文档被误当 scorer
dashboard 目标被误当真实展示
route test 被误当端到端执行
withdrawn_first_round_conclusions: 资产完整不等于能力 ready
路由测试通过不等于执行闭环
模板存在不等于报告闭环
知识库存在不等于知识接入
包卫生 ok 不等于 JS 审计质量
scores_to_lower: 严重 JS 漏洞发现
seven_day_plan: Day 2: 接入 Babel/TypeScript/tree-sitter AST backend，完成 AST positive/negative fixture。
Day 3: 实现 Source Map parser，覆盖 sourcesContent/sourceRoot/stale map。
Day 4: 实现 endpoint/auth/tenant resolver 与 role/tenant diff contract。
Day 5: 实现 Playwright/HAR bridge 和 request/response/screenshot evidence manifest。
Day 6: 为 30 类严重 JS 漏洞建立 detector registry 和四象限样本。
Day 7: 接入 report generator、dashboard、真实 OSS replay、knowledge/template hash baseline。
final_findings.preserve_kb_templates_proof: 修复后必须运行 knowledge_template_index_checker.py 与 hash baseline，对比新增包前后 knowledge/templates 文件列表与 SHA256。
final_findings.no_regression_proof: 修复后必须运行 package_self_check、trigger tester、schema validator、detector fixtures、dynamic replay dry-run、report/dashboard generation，并对比原始 Skill 路由链未减少。
